title: The Pro's Game
description: The Pro's Game is the ultimate Minecraft mod for Pro's!
body:
![The Pro's Game logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Octagon-Modding/the-pros-game/master/logo/No%20Edition.png)
The Pro's Game is the ultimate Minecraft mod for Pro's!

[![Java CI with Gradle](https://github.com/Octagon-Modding/the-pros-game/actions/workflows/build.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/Octagon-Modding/the-pros-game/actions/workflows/build.yml) ![GitHub repo size](https://img.shields.io/github/repo-size/Octagon-Modding/the-pros-game) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/OXg8Snlh?logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth%20Downloads&color=green)](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-pros-game)
 [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/319180?logo=curseforge&logoColor=black&label=CurseForge%20Downloads&labelColor=cc7000&color=blue)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pro-mod)



**Supported Minecraft Versions and Loaders:**

The latest version of The Pro's Game supports 1.20.6, 1.21.1, 1.21.4-1.21.11, and 26.1.2. It supports Forge, Fabric and NeoForge and only requires a single, universal jar for all versions and loaders. Simply download the mod, Pufferfish API, and if using Fabric, the Fabric API.

**Current Features:**

 - Emerald Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel and Hoe
 - Lapis Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel and Hoe
 - Glowstone Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel and Hoe
 - Obsidian Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel and Hoe
 - Redstone Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel and Hoe
 - Pro Food
 - Emerald Armor
 - Lapis Armor
 - Glowstone Armor
 - Obsidian Armor
 - Redstone Armor

**Currently In Development:**

 - Pro Chest
 - Pro Dimension and Portal
 - Revamped Textures
 - More features to come soon

**Contribution Guide:**
If you would like to contribute to The Pro's Game, please check out our [GitHub](https://github.com/Octagon-Modding/the-pros-game)
